title: davallia hookeri
intro: Davallia hookeri, also known as the Hooker's davallia or Hooker's fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, Davallia hookeri has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Davallia hookeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Davallia hookeri is often prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use as a medicinal plant requires further research and validation to confirm its efficacy and safety.
